Package noppes.npcs.api.handler.data

Interface INaturalSpawn

  • public interface INaturalSpawn
    Configures a natural spawn entry for custom NPCs, including entity templates, biome restrictions, spawn conditions, and cooldowns.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static int DESPAWN_FORCE_NATURAL
      Despawn mode: force natural despawn behavior.
      static int DESPAWN_FORCE_PERSISTENT
      Despawn mode: force persistent (never despawn).
      static int DESPAWN_PRESERVE_TEMPLATE
      Despawn mode: preserve the entity template's despawn setting.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int getAttemptsPerCycle()  
      String[] getBiomes()  
      int getCooldownTicks()  
      int getDespawnMode()  
      IEntity getEntity​(IWorld world, int slot)
      Returns the entity for a specific spawn slot.
      int getMaxAlive()  
      int getMaxHeight()  
      int getMinHeight()  
      String getName()  
      int getPlayerMinDistance()  
      Integer[] getSlots()  
      int getWeight()  
      void setAttemptsPerCycle​(int attempts)  
      void setBiomes​(String[] biomes)  
      void setCooldownTicks​(int ticks)  
      void setDespawnMode​(int mode)
      Sets the despawn mode.
      void setEntity​(IEntity entity, int slot)
      Sets the entity template for a specific spawn slot.
      void setMaxAlive​(int maxAlive)  
      void setMaxHeight​(int height)  
      void setMinHeight​(int height)  
      void setName​(String name)  
      void setPlayerMinDistance​(int distance)  
      void setWeight​(int weight)  
      boolean spawnsInAir()  
      void spawnsInAir​(boolean spawns)  
      boolean spawnsInLiquid()  
      void spawnsInLiquid​(boolean spawns)  
      boolean spawnsLikeAnimal()  
      void spawnsLikeAnimal​(boolean spawns)  
      boolean spawnsLikeMonster()  
      void spawnsLikeMonster​(boolean spawns)  

    • Field Detail

      • DESPAWN_FORCE_NATURAL

        static final int DESPAWN_FORCE_NATURAL
        Despawn mode: force natural despawn behavior.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DESPAWN_PRESERVE_TEMPLATE

        static final int DESPAWN_PRESERVE_TEMPLATE
        Despawn mode: preserve the entity template's despawn setting.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DESPAWN_FORCE_PERSISTENT

        static final int DESPAWN_FORCE_PERSISTENT
        Despawn mode: force persistent (never despawn).
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Method Detail

      • setName

        void setName​(String name)
        Parameters:
        name - the display name for this spawn entry.

      • getName

        String getName()
        Returns:
        the display name of this spawn entry.

      • setEntity

        void setEntity​(IEntity entity,
               int slot)
        Sets the entity template for a specific spawn slot.
        Parameters:
        entity - the entity template.
        slot - the slot index.

      • getEntity

        IEntity getEntity​(IWorld world,
                  int slot)
        Returns the entity for a specific spawn slot.
        Parameters:
        world - the world context for entity creation.
        slot - the slot index.
        Returns:
        the entity, or null if the slot is empty.

      • getSlots

        Integer[] getSlots()
        Returns:
        the populated slot indices.

      • setWeight

        void setWeight​(int weight)
        Parameters:
        weight - the spawn weight (higher = more frequent).

      • getWeight

        int getWeight()
        Returns:
        the spawn weight.

      • setMinHeight

        void setMinHeight​(int height)
        Parameters:
        height - the minimum Y-level for spawning.

      • getMinHeight

        int getMinHeight()
        Returns:
        the minimum Y-level.

      • setMaxHeight

        void setMaxHeight​(int height)
        Parameters:
        height - the maximum Y-level for spawning.

      • getMaxHeight

        int getMaxHeight()
        Returns:
        the maximum Y-level.

      • spawnsLikeAnimal

        void spawnsLikeAnimal​(boolean spawns)
        Parameters:
        spawns - whether entities can spawn using animal spawn rules.

      • spawnsLikeAnimal

        boolean spawnsLikeAnimal()
        Returns:
        true if animal spawn rules apply.

      • spawnsLikeMonster

        void spawnsLikeMonster​(boolean spawns)
        Parameters:
        spawns - whether entities can spawn using monster spawn rules.

      • spawnsLikeMonster

        boolean spawnsLikeMonster()
        Returns:
        true if monster spawn rules apply.

      • spawnsInLiquid

        void spawnsInLiquid​(boolean spawns)
        Parameters:
        spawns - whether entities can spawn in liquid.

      • spawnsInLiquid

        boolean spawnsInLiquid()
        Returns:
        true if spawning in liquid is allowed.

      • spawnsInAir

        void spawnsInAir​(boolean spawns)
        Parameters:
        spawns - whether entities can spawn in the air.

      • spawnsInAir

        boolean spawnsInAir()
        Returns:
        true if spawning in air is allowed.

      • getBiomes

        String[] getBiomes()
        Returns:
        the biome names this spawn is restricted to.

      • setBiomes

        void setBiomes​(String[] biomes)
        Parameters:
        biomes - the biome names to restrict spawning to.

      • setMaxAlive

        void setMaxAlive​(int maxAlive)
        Parameters:
        maxAlive - the maximum number of alive entities from this spawn at once.

      • getMaxAlive

        int getMaxAlive()
        Returns:
        the maximum alive entity count.

      • setCooldownTicks

        void setCooldownTicks​(int ticks)
        Parameters:
        ticks - the cooldown in ticks between spawn attempts.

      • getCooldownTicks

        int getCooldownTicks()
        Returns:
        the cooldown in ticks.

      • setAttemptsPerCycle

        void setAttemptsPerCycle​(int attempts)
        Parameters:
        attempts - the number of spawn attempts per cycle.

      • getAttemptsPerCycle

        int getAttemptsPerCycle()
        Returns:
        the number of spawn attempts per cycle.

      • setPlayerMinDistance

        void setPlayerMinDistance​(int distance)
        Parameters:
        distance - the minimum distance from a player for spawning.

      • getPlayerMinDistance

        int getPlayerMinDistance()
        Returns:
        the minimum distance from a player.

      • setDespawnMode

        void setDespawnMode​(int mode)
        Sets the despawn mode.
        Parameters:
        mode - 0: DESPAWN_FORCE_NATURAL, 1: DESPAWN_PRESERVE_TEMPLATE, 2: DESPAWN_FORCE_PERSISTENT.

      • getDespawnMode

        int getDespawnMode()
        Returns:
        the despawn mode (0: force natural, 1: preserve template, 2: force persistent).
